params.name: The Myth of Etana
params.description:
On Feb 23, 3209 BC, the priests recorded the legendary story of King Etana.
The Myth of Etana is a mythological work that has been passed down from ancient Sumerian times to the present day. It tells the story of Etana, the first king of the city-state of Kish, who seeks the "Tree of Life" and, following the command of the sun god, helps an injured eagle and is able to ascend to heaven. Symbolically, the myth represents Etana's unification of the Sumerian region and holds significant historic …
